content.problemStatement:
In this example, we simulate a simple student ID parser where we need to extract a department code from a full ID string.
The ID `"CS2025A9"` contains the department code at the beginning.
We use a loop to extract the first two characters of the ID and store them in a new string.

The substring is created manually using a loop and null-terminated to make it a valid C string.

**When executed, the code will show:**

```default
Department Code: CS
```
